items.title: S01E01 - Outer Space
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): Kermit cancels the boring parts of the show when Digit discovers he can tune in cable channels from other worlds.

infolabels.title: Outer Space

items.title: S01E02 - Oceans
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): Kermit tries to run the show with several disruptive water-related issues.

items.title: S01E03 - Power
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): Gonzo and Leon convince Kermit to take a vacation so they can run the show.

items.title: S01E04 - Dog City
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): Kermit announces 'Muppet Night at the Movies' as they try to find a film to broadcast on the All Dog Network (ADN).

infolabels.title: Dog City

items.title: S01E05 - First Show
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision). Kermit struggles to keep ratings up while Digit experiences various malfunctions.

infolabels.title: First Show
infolabels.plot: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision). Kermit struggles to keep ratings up while Digit experiences various malfunctions.

items.title: S01E06 - Monster Maker
items.summary: Teenage Matt Banting wants to work with famed eccentric creature/special effects man Chancey Bellow. He gets more than he bargained for when one of the creatures, the giant dragon-like Ultragorgon, takes Matt under his wing. Matt is forced to confront his inner monsters while working out his issues with his father.

He gets more than he bargained for when one of the creatures, the giant dragon-like Ultragorgon, takes Matt under his wing. Matt is forced to confront his inner monsters while working out his issues with his father.

items.title: S01E07 - Fitness
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): Kermit wants the show to be all about health and fitness but doesn't have much luck with all the Muppets getting sick.

items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): In order to be in two places at once, Gonzo prerecords himself.

items.title: S01E09 - Garbage
items.summary: Part 1 (MuppeTelevision): The Muppet studio is overwhelmed with animated garbage bags and Kermit can't find a way to get rid of them.

items.title: S01E10 - Secrets of the Muppets
items.summary: Henson takes viewers on a behind the scenes look at the making of the series and many other Henson productions. Back at the control room, the Muppets panic that their secrets are being revealed.

infolabels.title: Secrets of the Muppets
infolabels.plot: Henson takes viewers on a behind the scenes look at the making of the series and many other Henson productions. Back at the control room, the Muppets panic that their secrets are being revealed.

items.title: S01E11 - Living with Dinosaurs
items.summary: A socially awkward boy struggles with a new school, an unemployed stepfather, a pregnant mother, and asthma. The boy finds comfort in his favorite stuffed toy, a dinosaur named Dog.

infolabels.title: Living with Dinosaurs
infolabels.plot: A socially awkward boy struggles with a new school, an unemployed stepfather, a pregnant mother, and asthma. The boy finds comfort in his favorite stuffed toy, a dinosaur named Dog.

items.title: S01E12 - Food
items.summary: Part 1 (MupppeTelevision). Kermit has trouble keeping the show running because the entire staff is waiting for their lunch to be delivered.
